title: Peace Not Permanence
content:
Great cities seldom rest; if there be none
T' invade from far, they'll find worse foes at home.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Peace Not Permanence", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
